data.name: WELCOME_HEADING
data.value: Thank you for testing the project {0}!

data.name: WELCOME_BODY_1
data.value: Your account was successfully created. This is a study project developed by me (JonatasGdeC) to explore concepts of organization and productivity with a Kanban board.

data.name: WELCOME_BODY_2
data.value: Feel free to create boards, add tasks and test all available features. Your feedback is very valuable.

data.name: WELCOME_NOTE
data.value: This email was sent because you registered in the Kanban App. If it wasn't you, ignore this message.

data.name: RESET_HEADING
data.value: Hello {0}! Here is your recovery code

data.name: RESET_BODY_1
data.value: We received a request to reset your account password. Use the code below to continue the process.

data.name: RESET_ALERT
data.value: If you did not request a password reset, ignore this email. Your password remains the same.

data.name: RESET_BODY_2
data.value: For security, never share this code with anyone. Our team will never ask for your access code.

data.name: RESET_NOTE
data.value: This email was automatically generated. If you have questions, check your account settings.
